== Notes for [[Item:Q87353|Q87353]] ==

Strangely, no one bothered to cite a source to validate this MP profile. Here's a Wikipedia page about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Livia_(mother_of_Cato) Livia Drusa], It has several sources associated with it.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940B7A8231EFBBE49822EF79916CD1D7
geni:6000000027290117295

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
